pr_title: Replace bare 'more' follow-ups with novelty-aware prompts
pr_description: Replaces the static `"more"` continuation prompts in `identify_potential_levers.py` with dynamic novelty-aware follow-ups After each LLM call, collects generated lever names and injects them as an explicit exclusion list in the next prompt Expected to push cross-call lever uniqueness from ~70% (post-B1 fix) toward 90-100%
